div.head: The United States (GATT) Delegation to the Secretary of State
div.p: Tagg 48. Following is the text of the declaration adopted by the Contracting Parties on September 27:The Declaration was approved by roll-call vote, 24 votes in favor, 1 against, and 4 abstentions (Summary Record of the 14th Meeting, September 27, 1951, 3 p. m., Doc. GATT CP.6/SR. 14, 1 October 1951, GATT Files, Lot 63 D 134, Box 268).

quote.p: “Considering that the delegation of the United States has declared that the Government of Czechoslovakia, through its actions, has nullified benefits which should have accrued to the United States under the General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade;

“Considering that the delegation of Czechoslovakia has declared that the Government of the United States, through its actions, has nullified benefits which should have accrued to Czechoslovakia under the General Agreement;
